description: Smaller vireo, yellowish underside, very slight eyeline, white throat--blending into belly, weak white wingbars, greenish upperside, dark eye.Behaviors: No behaviors seen--bird captured in mist net at Rocky Mountain Bird Observatory's Barr Lake State Park banding station.Call: Not heardPlumage: Pre-formative
